FFlagPluginGuiPluginProp.purpose: Enhances the usability of plugins by making them more interactive and customizable.

FFlagFixSelfieConsentStyleLinks_Staged.mechanism: Corrects the styling of consent links in the selfie feature.
FFlagFixSelfieConsentStyleLinks_Staged.purpose: Provides a better visual experience for users when giving consent for selfies.

FFlagLuaAppSearchPillCarouselNavToTopRes.mechanism: Modifies the navigation of search results in the app to prioritize top results.
FFlagLuaAppSearchPillCarouselNavToTopRes.purpose: Helps players find the most relevant content quickly and easily.

FFlagFCRouteSecondaryParts3_Staged.mechanism: Updates the routing system for secondary parts in the game.
FFlagFCRouteSecondaryParts3_Staged.purpose: Improves gameplay by ensuring better handling of secondary game elements.

FFlagCliWorkspaceAwareness.mechanism: Enables the client to be aware of changes in the workspace environment.
FFlagCliWorkspaceAwareness.purpose: Improves the responsiveness and interaction of game elements for players.

DFFlagCreatorConfigProviderAssetFailedFa.mechanism: Allows the system to fallback to polling for asset updates if the primary method fails.
DFFlagCreatorConfigProviderAssetFailedFa.purpose: Ensures players can still access and see updated content even if there are issues.

FFlagSelfieConsentPrivacyLinkAndroid_Sta.mechanism: Adds a privacy link for selfie consent specifically on Android devices.
FFlagSelfieConsentPrivacyLinkAndroid_Sta.purpose: Increases transparency and trust regarding privacy for players using selfies.

FFlagAXRemoveCatalogTopicBarOnDidFocus.mechanism: Removes the topic bar from the catalog when it gains focus.
FFlagAXRemoveCatalogTopicBarOnDidFocus.purpose: Streamlines the catalog interface for a cleaner browsing experience.

FFlagFFlagAXRemoveCatalogCategoryIconOnO.mechanism: Disables the display of category icons in the catalog.
FFlagFFlagAXRemoveCatalogCategoryIconOnO.purpose: Simplifies the catalog layout, making it easier for players to navigate.

FFlagAXFetchMoreCollectibleWhileFetchAss.mechanism: Allows fetching additional collectible data while retrieving asset or bundle information.
FFlagAXFetchMoreCollectibleWhileFetchAss.purpose: Improves the speed and efficiency of loading collectibles for players.

FFlagLuaAppAddTestIdsForEdpInfoTable.mechanism: Introduces test identifiers in the Lua application for easier debugging.
FFlagLuaAppAddTestIdsForEdpInfoTable.purpose: Enhances the reliability of the app, leading to a smoother experience for players.

FFlagAppChatHideMoreButtonFAE.mechanism: Removes the 'More' button in the chat interface.
FFlagAppChatHideMoreButtonFAE.purpose: Simplifies the chat interface, making it easier for players to communicate.

FFlagFoundationPopoverNegateAlignOffsetO.mechanism: Adjusts alignment offsets when popovers are flipped.
FFlagFoundationPopoverNegateAlignOffsetO.purpose: Ensures popovers display correctly, improving usability for players.

FFlagLuauNumericUnaryOpsDontProduceNegat.mechanism: Changes how numeric unary operations handle negation in code.
FFlagLuauNumericUnaryOpsDontProduceNegat.purpose: Reduces coding errors, leading to more stable game performance for players.

FFlagUseNewHapticServiceInUA4_Staged.mechanism: Enables a new system for providing haptic feedback on supported devices.
FFlagUseNewHapticServiceInUA4_Staged.purpose: Improves the tactile experience for players by allowing them to feel vibrations during gameplay.

DFFlagEnableNetStackEphemeralEarlyPubKey.mechanism: Introduces a new method for securely loading player data using temporary keys.
DFFlagEnableNetStackEphemeralEarlyPubKey.purpose: Enhances the speed and security of loading player information, leading to a smoother experience.

FFlagFoundationDialogUpdateZIndex.mechanism: Adjusts the layering order of dialog boxes in the user interface.
FFlagFoundationDialogUpdateZIndex.purpose: Ensures that important dialogs appear above other elements, making them more visible and accessible.

FFlagStyledInstanceContext_Staged.mechanism: Implements a new way to manage styles for UI components.
FFlagStyledInstanceContext_Staged.purpose: Allows for more visually appealing and consistent user interfaces in games.

FFlagDynamicReportPrettyErrorMessage.mechanism: Improves the format of error messages displayed to players.
FFlagDynamicReportPrettyErrorMessage.purpose: Makes error messages clearer and more user-friendly, helping players understand issues better.

FFlagShowRatingDuringPublish.mechanism: Displays the game's rating when a developer is publishing their game.
FFlagShowRatingDuringPublish.purpose: Helps developers see how well their game is rated before making it live.

FFlagPlayerListHideUnusedStats.mechanism: Hides statistics in the player list that are not currently in use.
FFlagPlayerListHideUnusedStats.purpose: Makes the player list cleaner and easier to read for players.

DFIntNetStackDummyClientPingStatsThrottl.mechanism: Limits the frequency of ping statistics updates for the client.
DFIntNetStackDummyClientPingStatsThrottl.purpose: Improves performance by reducing unnecessary data updates, leading to a smoother gameplay experience.
